objects.query: SELECT Name, ProcessorName__c, Enabled__c, isHighPriority__c, isRecurrent__c, MaxChunkSize__c, MaxExecutionAttempt__c, MinJobInterval__c, CalloutConsumption__c, CalloutTimeConsumption__c, CpuTimeConsumption__c, DmlRowsConsumption__c, DmlStatementsConsumption__c, FutureCallsConsumption__c, HeapSizeConsumption__c FROM JobDescription__c
SELECT Name, JobDescription__c, JobDescription__r.ProcessorName__c, Argument__c, Enabled__c, Status__c, NextExecutionDateTime__c, AttemptNumber__c FROM JobRequest__c
